scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) returns null when TreeBuilder.parse returns null
pseudocode: @Override public Document parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p) { return null; }

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) propagates UncheckedIOException when Reader.read fails
scenarios.precondition: FakeTreeBuilder.parse reads from broken Reader and wraps IOException in UncheckedIOException
scenarios.expectedResult: UncheckedIOException is thrown with cause IOException
pseudocode: TEST TC12_O2_uncheckedIO parseInput Reader throws UncheckedIOException
@Override public int read(char[] c, int off, int len) throws IOException { throw new IOException("read error"); }
@Override public Document parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p) {
try { in.read(new char[1], 0, 1); } catch (IOException e) { throw new UncheckedIOException(e); }
throws UncheckedIOException with cause message "read error";
